info.name: ArtifexAI — Model Comparison
info.description: Compare Gemini, Flux-2 (fal-ai), Qwen (fal-ai), and FireRed (fal-ai) outputs for the same Fantasy project prompts. Run requests in order: (1) Setup → (2) Splash Art → (3) Image Variation.

variable.description: Value of the API_TOKEN environment variable set on the server.
Populated automatically by the Create Project test script.
CloudFront/S3 path of a reference image to use for variation calls (copy from any splash art response).

exec: console.warn('Could not extract project_id from response:', JSON.stringify(json));

item.name: 2 — Splash Art (Model Comparison)
item.description: Identical splash art description sent to each model. Compare quality, composition, and style adherence.

item.name: 3 — Image Variation (Model Comparison)
item.description: Identical variation prompt and reference image sent to each model. Set {{image_path}} to a CloudFront path from any splash art response before running these.
